prompt: Create a single red cube at the world origin.

evaluation_rubric.description: Output describes or creates exactly one object
The object's primitive/geometry is a cube (or box)
The object's color is red (or specifies a red material/RGB tuple roughly (1,0,0))
The object is placed at world origin (0,0,0) or has no explicit translation

expected_artifacts: scene with one red cube at origin

prompt: Add a blue sphere of radius 0.5 at position (1, 0, 0).
expected_artifacts: scene with one blue sphere at (1,0,0)

prompt: Place a green cylinder of height 2 standing on the ground plane (y=0 is the ground).

evaluation_rubric.description: Cylinder bottom is at or near y=0; bottom-of-cylinder rests on the plane

expected_artifacts: scene with one green cylinder standing on y=0

prompt: Create a directional light pointing downward.

evaluation_rubric.description: Light type is directional (not point or spot)
Light direction is downward, e.g. (0,-1,0) or equivalent

expected_artifacts: scene with one directional light shining down

prompt: Add a flat ground plane 10 meters by 10 meters, gray.

evaluation_rubric.description: Output creates a plane (or thin box) acting as ground
Color is gray (RGB roughly equal channels around 0.5)

expected_artifacts: scene with one gray 10x10 ground plane

prompt: Create a yellow cube and rotate it 45 degrees around the Y axis.

evaluation_rubric.description: Cube has Y-axis rotation of 45 degrees (or equivalent quaternion within 1 deg)

expected_artifacts: scene with one yellow cube rotated 45 degrees on Y

prompt: Place a perspective camera at (5, 5, 5) looking at the origin.
expected_artifacts: scene with one perspective camera looking at origin

prompt: Add a torus with major radius 1 and minor radius 0.25 at (0, 1, 0).
Make a small pink cone with its tip pointing up, at the origin.
expected_artifacts: scene with one pink cone at origin, tip up

prompt: Create a scene with a single point light of color white at position (2, 4, 2).

evaluation_rubric.description: Output creates a point light (not directional or spot)

expected_artifacts: scene with one white point light at (2,4,2)
